🏷️ Robotics 🏷️ Control and Planning 🏷️ Legged Locomotion 🏷️ Optimal Control


J. Shim, C. Mastalli, T. Corberes, S. Tonneau, V. Ivan, and S. Vijayakumar, “Topology-Based MPC for Automatic Footstep Placement and Contact Surface Selection”, in International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2023. [Link]
